item.title: COMMENT | Problem not 'dakwah' but inducements, misuse of public institutions
item.description: Public universities must remain neutral space, not used for conversion campaigns.
item.dc:creator: MCCBCHST

item.title: COMMENT | Choose humanity over vitriol in managing refugees
item.description: Govt must adhere to international standards.
item.dc:creator: Anand Raj

item.title: COMMENT | We Malaysians are a nice bunch of people, right?
item.description: Let's be sympathetic to the plight of refugees.
item.dc:creator: Zan Azlee

item.title: ADUN SPEAKS | What the Upsi controversy really reveals?
item.description: Muslims have constitutional right to practice, share their faith.
item.dc:creator: Nushi Mahfoz

item.title: COMMENT | Choosing kindness amid misinformation and hate
item.description: Threatening Rohingya community with violence unacceptable.
item.dc:creator: Jasnitha Nair

item.title: MP SPEAKS | Selangor govt must clarify halal, non-halal waste separation policy
item.description: Questions remain over definitions, costs, and implementation of new mall rules.
item.dc:creator: Lee Chean Chung

item.title: COMMENT | From kick-off to cover-up: Malaysia's football farce
item.description: Malaysians should not forget.
item.dc:creator: R Nadeswaran

item.title: COMMENT | UEC becomes political football and students pay the price
item.description: Multi-stream education existed before the nation's founding, but politicians refuse to acknowledge it.
item.dc:creator: Mariam Mokhtar

item.title: COMMENT | 1MDB, Najib and the elections
item.description: Umno should understand by now that ex-PM is a liability.
item.dc:creator: P Gunasegaram

item.title: COMMENT | State polls first audit of Anwar's political arrangement
item.description: Fraying Harapan-BN alliance shows limits of political pacts of convenience.
item.dc:creator: Rizal Hamdan

item.title: COMMENT | Is Netanyahu losing influence in the US?
item.description: While region remains volatile, Israel can no longer expect unconditional support from Washington.
item.dc:creator: Mahathir Mohd Rais

item.title: COMMENT | Anti-Rohingya hate campaign not harmless, authorities must act
item.description: Precedents throughout history show that normalised hate speech eventually leads to violence.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Sasidaran

item.title: ADUN SPEAKS | J-Kom DG must resign or be removed over 'Cina sesat' insult
item.description: This is to preserve the credibility and integrity of the institution.
item.dc:creator: Chin Tek Ming

item.title: COMMENT | Don't be a fixed deposit voter for anyone
item.description: Voters have a choice despite what politicians say.
item.dc:creator: Rashifa Aljunied

item.title: COMMENT | Rohingya in Malaysia: Finding a balanced path forward
item.description: Addressing legitimate concerns without abandoning humanitarian responsibilities.
item.dc:creator: Hanipa Maidin

item.title: COMMENT | Ministry not practising own 'verify before sharing' slogan
item.description: Leaders urge caution, but their actions repeatedly undermine that message.
item.dc:creator: R Nadeswaran

item.title: COMMENT | Is it Anwar's last hurrah?
item.description: This is not an election Malaysians are going to sit out.
item.dc:creator: P Gunasegaram

item.title: COMMENT | Prosecutorial rules, transparency must accompany AG-PP separation
item.description: Putrajaya can emulate best practices of the UK, Canada.
item.dc:creator: Ngeow Chow Ying, Farah Izzah Haron

item.title: COMMENT | Green Wave politics and limits of non-Malay influence in M'sia
item.description: Limited ability to resist rise of political Islam despite support for centrist coalitions.
item.dc:creator: S Thayaparan

item.title: COMMENT | Stop the hate, protect Rohingya refugees
item.description: Online disinformation targeting community has rapidly translated into real harm on the ground.
item.dc:creator: Eric Paulsen

item.title: COMMENT | Peopling of Peninsular Malaysia, a shared homeland
item.description: All communities, including Orang Asli, sacrificed for this land we call home.
item.dc:creator: Ranjit Singh Malhi

item.title: COMMENT | We hear your concerns, but please be fair
item.description: Don't judge an entire community over the fault of a few.
item.dc:creator: Husson Ahmad

item.title: COMMENT | Is rage-baiting J-Kom's new tactic?
item.description: Rage-baiting indicates our politics have yet to progress.
item.dc:creator: Zan Azlee

item.title: COMMENT | Undang vs the law
item.description: Negeri Sembilan's history shows the current dispute between undangs is not the first.
item.dc:creator: Murale Pillai

item.title: COMMENT | When an explanation becomes an excuse
item.description: When explanations are repeated year after year, they are just excuses for failure.
item.dc:creator: Mariam Mokhtar

item.title: COMMENT | A walk for peace Malaysia needs
item.description: Peace comes when we treat others with compassion.
item.dc:creator: Susan Loone

item.title: COMMENT | Trump-Xi summit signals shift in global order - is the unipolar system waning?
item.description: Beijing dominates post-summit narrative, raising questions about US confidence.
item.dc:creator: Lam Choong Wah

item.title: COMMENT | NFA: No further action or 'not for Azam'?
item.description: Decision prompts questions and draws scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: Hanipa Maidin

item.title: MP SPEAKS | Non-Malay frustration, anger understandable, but...
item.description: It misses the fact that Pakatan Harapan did not win GE15 outright.
item.dc:creator: William Leong

item.title: COMMENT | The currency of politics we've stopped believing in
item.description: Voter trust is eroding, and turnout trends suggest a deeper political fatigue.
item.dc:creator: Farhan Iqbal
